notes:
A big release that adds Gemini support, on-demand agent setup, and HTML sharing, alongside a refreshed settings layout and a host of editor and viewer improvements.

### New

- **Gemini support** — choose Google's Gemini as a provider, with live chat, history, and resume alongside Claude and Codex.
- **On-demand agent setup** — Palette downloads and installs the coding agents and runtimes you need on demand, so there's nothing to set up by hand.
- **Bring your own API key** — run Claude on your own Anthropic API key instead of a subscription, with the same option extended to Codex.
- **Share as HTML** — publish a styled, self-contained HTML version of your work from a new share button, complete with a title you choose.
- **Pinnable comments** — drop pinned comments on shared HTML previews using a Figma-style pin cursor.
- **Handoffs inbox** — a new inbox feed that launches handoffs straight into sessions.
- **Rich markdown editor** — edit `.md` files in a WYSIWYG editor instead of raw text.
- **Interface zoom** — zoom the whole interface in and out across every window.
- **Two-pane settings** — settings now pair a category rail with a dedicated content pane for easier navigation.
- **Open-source license viewer** — browse the app's open-source attributions from within Palette.

### Improved

- **Wide tables and drawers** — wide tables scroll cleanly, and side drawers animate smoothly in the viewer and sidebar.
- **Copy markdown** — copy a `.md` file's contents straight from the sidebar with one button.
- **Direct file links** — file pills in a turn now open the file itself rather than the checkpoint.
- **Clearer account status** — the account indicator reflects the actual setup state of the access you've selected.

### Fixed

- **Layout-independent zoom keys** — Cmd +/−/0 now zoom regardless of your keyboard layout.
- **No more lost markdown edits** — switching sessions no longer discards unsaved `.md` changes.
- **Drafts kept on update** — unsaved drafts are preserved when you update a session.

### New

- **HTML sharing** — share your work as a styled HTML page, complete with a title and pinnable comments.
- **More AI providers** — pick Claude, Codex, or Mistral, each installed on demand the first time you need it.
- **Bring your own API key** — run Claude on your own Anthropic API key, with key-based access also available for Codex.
- **Handoffs inbox** — a new inbox feed that launches handoffs straight into sessions.
- **Rich markdown editing** — edit `.md` files in a WYSIWYG editor, and copy their markdown from the sidebar.
- **Interface zoom** — zoom the whole interface in and out across every window.
- **License viewer** — browse open-source license attributions from inside the app.

### Improved

- **Settings layout** — a cleaner two-pane settings screen with a category rail alongside the content.
- **Smarter checkpoints** — manual file operations and edits made outside the app are now captured in your history.
- **Turn file links** — file pills in a turn now open the file directly instead of the checkpoint.

### Fixed

- **Zoom shortcuts** — Cmd +, −, and 0 now work regardless of your keyboard layout.
- **Markdown edits on switch** — your changes are no longer lost when switching between sessions.
- **Unsaved drafts** — drafts are now preserved when you update a session.
- **Signed commits** — Palette's internal commits are never GPG-signed, so they no longer fail for some setups.
- **Sharing feedback** — now opens an in-app survey instead of leaving the app.

A release focused on richer sharing, a redesigned settings screen, and handy viewer tools.

### New

- **HTML sharing** — share your work as a styled HTML page with a new share button and modal.
- **Sealed HTML preview** — preview shared HTML with pinnable comments you can drop right on the page.
- **Interface zoom** — zoom the interface in and out across every window.
- **Copy as Markdown** — copy any `.md` file to your clipboard straight from the sidebar.
- **Open-source licenses** — browse the licenses of the open-source software Palette is built on, right inside the app.

### Improved

- **Redesigned settings** — a cleaner two-pane layout with a category rail alongside the content.
- **Styled shared pages** — shared HTML now carries its styling with it, so it always renders the way it looks in the app.

### Fixed

- **Share feedback** — the feedback option now opens an in-app survey instead of leaving the app.
- **Checkpoints** — Palette's internal saves no longer fail when you have commit signing turned on.

### Improved
- **Update notification** — the update-ready notification has a cleaner layout with a clear primary button to install.
- **Automatic update checks** — Palette now re-checks for updates every few hours and whenever you return to the app.

### Fixed
- **Release notes channel** — What's New now shows the release notes that match your update channel.

Palette now keeps itself up to date more reliably and shows release notes that match your update channel.

### Improved
- **Faster update checks** — Palette re-checks for new versions every few hours and whenever you return to the app, so you're never far behind the latest release.

### Fixed
- **Release notes match your channel** — What's New now shows only the notes for your update channel, so you won't see entries for releases you're not on.

A big release that adds a new AI provider, hands-on file management, and a redesigned, more polished workspace.

### New

- **Mistral Vibe provider** — choose Mistral's Vibe agent alongside your existing providers.
- **Files area actions** — right-click to delete, rename, or create folders, drag files to move them, and drag in from Finder to copy files into your workspace.
- **Paste & drop images** — paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into chat, or drag files onto a session to attach them.
- **Report a Bug** — send bug reports and feedback directly from the app.
- **Tab shortcuts** — jump to the next or previous tab with ⌃⇥ and ⌃⇧⇥.
- **What's New** — see friendly, in-app release notes whenever the app updates.
- **Your Palette account** — sign in to set up your account and organization, and see your profile right in the app.

### Improved

- **Chat transcript** — a cleaner chronological view with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Workspace polish** — native tinted glass on macOS, refined code blocks, tooltips, colors, and shimmering "working" labels.
- **Sidebar & explorer** — a reworked explorer with Skills and History tabs, plus illustrated empty states for Files, Changes, Skills, and Sessions.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters.
- **Quickstart** — redesigned create-workspace, marketplace, and template screens.
- **Menu pages** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and Organisational context as full pages, with the current page shown in the titlebar.
- **Tab indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions.
- **Plan mode** — "Keep chatting" lets you interrupt and redirect while a plan is in progress.
- **Message recovery** — your message is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.

### Fixed

- **Tab stability** — fixed a crash when closing tabs and made the whole tab clickable, not just its label.
- **In-app links** — clicking a link no longer navigates the entire app window.
- **Mentions & queued messages** — the mention popover and queued-message tray now stay tied to the active session.
- **Empty states** — repaired blank history and Skills views, and replaced a raw What's New heading with a friendly summary.

A big release that adds a new AI provider, richer file management, and a more polished chat and workspace experience throughout.

### New

- **Mistral Vibe provider** — pick Mistral's Vibe agent alongside Claude when starting a session.
- **File management in the Files area** — right-click to delete, rename, or create folders, drag files to move them, and drag in from Finder to copy.
- **Paste images into chat** — drop in screenshots and clipboard images as attachments without saving them first.
- **Report a Bug** — send feedback and bug reports directly from the app.
- **What's New** — see friendly, readable release notes inside the app after each update.
- **Native tab shortcuts** — jump between tabs with ⌃⇥ and ⌃⇧⇥.
- **Your profile** — your account details now load and display from your Palette profile.
- **Menu pages** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and Org context as full pages in the main area.

### Improved

- **Chat transcript** — messages and tool runs now read as a single chronological timeline with related steps grouped together.
- **Drag-to-attach** — a drop overlay appears when you drag files over a session.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters, and the explorer now has dedicated Skills and History tabs per session.
- **Keep chatting** — interrupt a plan and continue the conversation without losing your place.
- **Cancel safety** — a message you send is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.
- **Tab indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers on tabs and sessions, plus a titlebar breadcrumb showing the open page.
- **Quickstart redesign** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Visual polish** — native tinted glass on macOS, nicer code blocks, tooltips, shimmering working labels, and illustrated empty states across the sidebar.

### Fixed

- **Tab stability** — closing a tab no longer crashes, and the whole tab is now clickable rather than just its label.
- **In-app links** — clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Mentions and queued messages** — the mention popover and queued-message tray now stay scoped to the active session.
- **Empty states** — history and Skills views no longer show up blank when they shouldn't.

### New

- **Report a Bug** — send feedback and bug reports straight from the app.
- **What's New** — see friendly, AI-generated release notes in-app after each update.
- **Paste & drop images** — paste screenshots or clipboard images as attachments, with a drop-to-attach overlay when you drag files over a session.
- **Drag files in and around** — drag files in the Files area to move them, and drag straight from Finder to copy them in.
- **Tab shortcuts** — jump between tabs with native ⌃⇥ and ⌃⇧⇥ shortcuts.
- **Skills & History explorer** — a rebuilt Skills panel with source and provider filters, plus a reworked sidebar with Skills and History tabs that remember each session.
- **Context pages** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and your org's context as full main-area pages, with a redesigned Palette surface.
- **Keep chatting** — interrupt a running plan to keep the conversation going.

### Improved

- **Chronological transcript** — sessions now read top to bottom with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Tab & session indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions.
- **Titlebar breadcrumb** — the currently open menu page now shows in the titlebar.
- **Cancel keeps your message** — cancelling before a response restores your text to the input so nothing is lost.
- **Redesigned flows** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Empty states** — friendly illustrated placeholders for sessions, Files, Changes, and Skills.
- **Visual polish** — native tinted glass, cleaner chat code blocks, smoother tab hover and shimmer animations, and tighter alignment across rows, popovers, and icons.

### Fixed

- **Tab clicks** — closing a tab no longer crashes, and the whole tab is clickable, not just its label.
- **In-app links** — clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Session states** — fixed cases where history and Skills could silently show up empty.

### New

- **Report a Bug** — send feedback straight from the app when something goes wrong.
- **What's New** — see friendly release notes right inside the app after each update.
- **Image attachments** — paste screenshots and clipboard images, or drag files over a session to attach them.
- **Tab shortcuts** — jump to the next or previous tab with ⌃⇥ and ⌃⇧⇥.
- **Menu pages** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and your org context as full pages in the main area.
- **Keep your message on cancel** — text you sent is restored to the input if you cancel before a response arrives.

### Improved

- **Reworked sidebar** — the explorer now has Skills and History tabs that remember their state per session.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters so you can find the right skill faster.
- **Chronological transcript** — messages and tool runs are grouped in order for an easier-to-follow conversation.
- **Keep chatting while planning** — interrupt a plan to chat without losing your place.
- **Tab indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers across tabs and sessions, plus the current page shown in the titlebar breadcrumb.
- **Illustrated empty states** — friendlier placeholders for Sessions, Files, Changes, and Skills.
- **Redesigned quickstart** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Visual polish** — native tinted glass on macOS, smoother tab hover, refined session rows and icons, and shimmering "working" labels.

### Fixed

- **Tab clicks** — the whole tab is clickable now, and closing a tab no longer crashes.
- **In-app links** — clicking a link no longer navigates away from the app.
- **Session history** — empty history and Skills views no longer fail silently.

### New
- **In-app What's New** — see friendly, AI-generated release notes right inside the app after each update.
- **Skills & History explorer** — browse Skills and session History in the sidebar, with state kept per session.
- **Paste images into chat** — paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into a session as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** — a drop overlay appears while you drag files over a session so you can attach them in place.
- **Menu pages in the main area** — open References, Marketplace, Help, and your Org context as full pages.

### Improved
- **Tab indicators** — clearer unread and attention markers on tabs and sessions so you can tell what needs you.
- **Chronological transcript** — chat now reads top-to-bottom with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters to find the right skill faster.
- **Quickstart redesign** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Plan mode** — a "Keep chatting" interrupt, tab-scoped controls, and cleaner status chips.
- **Titlebar breadcrumb** — the titlebar now shows which menu page you have open.
- **Empty states** — illustrated placeholders for Files, Changes, and Skills when there's nothing to show.
- **Native macOS look** — tinted glass styling and tab hover animations aligned with sessions.
- **Polished "working" labels** — animated shimmer on working indicators, plus refreshed session rows, popovers, and icons.

Palette Desktop v0.16.0 brings a refreshed workspace experience with a new What's New panel, smarter file attachments, and a redesigned sidebar and quickstart flow.

### New

- **In-app What's New** — see friendly, automatically generated release notes right inside the app whenever you update.
- **Paste images directly** — paste screenshots and clipboard images straight into chat as attachments.
- **Drag-and-drop attachments** — drop files anywhere over a session and a clear overlay shows you exactly where they'll attach.
- **Skills + History tabs** — the sidebar explorer now includes dedicated Skills and History tabs that remember their state per session.

### Improved

- **Keep chatting while planning** — interrupt a plan to keep the conversation going, with tab-scoped controls and cleaner status chips.
- **Cleaner transcript** — chat now reads in a single chronological flow with related tool runs grouped together.
- **Skills panel** — rebuilt with source and provider filters so you can find the right skill faster.
- **References, Marketplace, Help & Org context** — these now open as full main-area pages instead of cramped popups.
- **Redesigned quickstart** — refreshed create-workspace, marketplace, and template detail screens.
- **Illustrated empty states** — Files, Changes, and Skills now show helpful illustrations when there's nothing to display yet.
- **Native macOS polish** — tinted glass effects and smoother, more consistent tab and session hover animations.
- **Visual refinements** — session rows, popovers, and icons tightened up across the app.
- **Animated status labels** — "working" labels now shimmer with a subtle shine while tasks run.
